title: Dataset : Technology, Learning, Innovation Capabilities on Marketing Performance of Food and Beverage MSMEs in Jakarta Metropolitan Area
author: Kristy, Josephine Mathena
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This Dataset was collected from Food and Beverage MSMEs owners in the Jakarta Metropolitan Area through online forums, such as social media and MSMEs communities by offline. The research used a quantitative method analyzed with SmartPls based on Hair et al rule for data sample. Data include indicators of Technology Capability, Learning Capability, Innovation Capability, and Marketing Performance.
steps_raw: This Dataset was collected from Food and Beverage MSMEs owners in the Jakarta Metropolitan Area through online forums, such as social media and MSMEs communities by offline.
